name: Kmd Brands Limited
analysis: KMD's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 77% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0680, stop A$0.0594, target A$0.0760 (0.93:1) — then trail it.
